results.summary: WhiteFiber Inc ($WYFI) carries broadly bullish social sentiment driven by strong fundamental narratives — 79% YoY revenue growth, 60% gross margins, a $160M AI contract, and pending data center energization events — though the stock has pulled back ~34% from its recent peak near $46.90, attracting both accumulation interest and skepticism about its legitimacy. Key near-term risks include New York State's moratorium on hyperscale data centers over 50MW, elevated short-seller activity, and concerns that recent price action was partly influencer-driven rather than organic.
